import io
import string

fn main() -> Result<Unit, String>
  let all = io.read_to_end()
  let lines = string.split(all, "\n")
  mut sum = 0
  mut i = 0
  while i < list.len(lines)
    let line_opt = lines.get(i)
    i = i + 1
    match line_opt
    when None
      # skip
    when Some(line)
      let trimmed = string.trim(line)
      if not string.is_empty(trimmed)
        let parts = string.split_whitespace(trimmed)
        if parts.len() >= 2
          let tok_opt = parts.get(1)
          match tok_opt
          when None
            # skip
          when Some(tok)
            let n_opt = string.parse_int(tok)
            match n_opt
            when None
              # skip
            when Some(n)
              sum = sum + n
            end
          end
        end
      end
    end
  end
  print("sum=#{sum}")
  Ok(())
end
